title: 3.5 Listor med None och en bestämd längd

files.name: main.py
files.content:
namelist = 3*[None]
agelist = 3*[None]
for i in range(3):
    namelist[i] = input("Name of person number " + str(i+1)+ ": ")
    agelist[i] = input("Age of person number " + str(i+1)+": ")

print(namelist)
print(agelist)
